findings.title: Verification command does not pass in the reviewed workspace
findings.description: Running bun test poc/p-llm.test.ts poc/a-llm-sub.test.ts failed. P-LLM fails because no attempt is both passed and subscription-routed, and A-LLM-SUB fails because the verdict has determinism, schema, and ACT-amendment checks false. The current live verdict records only failed Codex and Claude CLI attempts, so the required subscription reachability and decision-schema assertions are not proven.

findings.title: P-LLM red-before-green evidence is not a genuine behavioral red
findings.description: The recorded P-LLM red run is produced by the PANOP_LLM_PROBE_RBG_BREAK_DETERMINISM path feeding identical decisions to assertDeterministic while expecting a divergence error. That failure proves an intentionally wrong test expectation, not that the probe would catch a real missing determinism, latency, schema, cost, or prompt-amendment implementation. The mandate requires genuine red-before-green evidence for every blocking gate.

findings.title: ACT amendment assertion is tautological
findings.description: HOT_LOOP_PROMPT includes the amended status/information-query criterion, but it also explicitly instructs the model to choose panopticon.steer for the exact status query later asserted. The assertion would still pass if the amended criterion line were removed, so the test does not independently prove the named-callsign status query behavior.

findings.title: Required planning rows are not present in the worktree
findings.description: docs/planning/03-eng.md and docs/planning/04-backpressure.md are absent from the reviewed checkout, so the exact REQ-3, REQ-10, and engineering-only gate rows could not be verified from disk as required by the review mandate.
